description: A repair that was marked as 'complete' yesterday has failed again. The operator needs to re-open the original ticket.

nodes.task_description: Find the recently closed maintenance ticket for the asset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the work order that was closed yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Change the status of the ticket from 'Closed' back to 'Open' or 'Re-opened'.
Add a new log entry explaining that the issue has recurred and re-assign it to the maintenance team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds notes and the ticket appears back in the maintenance queue with a high priority.
